collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (3 total Queries, 3 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT YEAR(tanggal_panen) AS tahun, SUM(berat_kg) AS total_kg, SUM(berat_kg * harga_per_kg) AS total_nilai, COUNT(*) AS jumlah_panen FROM `hasil_panen` WHERE YEAR(tanggal_panen) >= 2024 AND YEAR(tanggal_panen) <= 2026 GROUP BY `tahun` ORDER BY `tahun` ASC

SELECT `grade`, SUM(berat_kg) AS total_kg, SUM(berat_kg * harga_per_kg) AS total_nilai, COUNT(*) AS jumlah FROM `hasil_panen` WHERE YEAR(tanggal_panen) >= 2024 AND YEAR(tanggal_panen) <= 2026 GROUP BY `grade`

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT YEAR(tanggal_panen) AS tahun, SUM(berat_kg) AS total_kg, SUM(berat_kg * harga_per_kg) AS total_nilai, COUNT(*) AS jumlah_panen FROM `hasil_panen` WHERE YEAR(tanggal_panen) >= 2024 AND YEAR(tanggal_panen) <= 2026 GROUP BY `tahun` ORDER BY `tahun` ASC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT `grade`, SUM(berat_kg) AS total_kg, SUM(berat_kg * harga_per_kg) AS total_nilai, COUNT(*) AS jumlah FROM `hasil_panen` WHERE YEAR(tanggal_panen) >= 2024 AND YEAR(tanggal_panen) <= 2026 GROUP BY `grade`
